action_text: Scroll down the Reports list to load and view more report entries
rationale: Only one report row is visible; scrolling may reveal more reports including the target “Incidents by agent.”

action_text: Press Enter in the global search field to run the search for "incidents by agent"
rationale: The global search box already contains “incidents by agent”; executing it may quickly locate the specific report record.

action_text: Click the Title column header to sort reports by title
rationale: Sorting by Title can make it easier to find “Incidents by agent” alphabetically in the list.

action_text: Click the Table column header to sort/filter by table
rationale: Sorting by the Table column groups Incident-based reports together, narrowing the scan to relevant items.

action_text: Click the expand/caret control at the left of the list to reveal more report items
rationale: Expanding the list tree/folder may reveal additional report categories or items hidden under a collapsed node.
